author: Ryan
body: First time on your blog. Was looking for lyrics for I Will Remain, but had to comment about your assessment about men and banjos. I completely agree. Some how I have moved from the Smashing Pumpkins and Bad Religion of my youth to loving songs with Banjos. It started with Old Crow Medicine show, moved on to the Avett Brothers, latched on to Mumford and Sons and immediately dug I Will Remain. It has come to the point I look wistfully at Banjo classes in the community college class offerings.

author: Burgo
body:
Hi Ryan,  
Dude, it sounds like we need to compare music notes… your music journey sounds pretty much exactly like mine!

Thanks very much for the cool comment.
